autoscaling.scalingpolicy.metric.CfnAbou:
Represents a specific metric. 

 `Metric` is a property of the [AWS::AutoScaling::ScalingPolicy MetricStat](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSCloudFormation/latest/UserGuide/aws-properties-autoscaling-scalingpolicy-metricstat.html) property type.

autoscaling.scalingpolicy.metric.Dimensi.Description: The dimensions for the metric. For the list of available dimensions, see the AWS documentation available from the table in [AWS services that publish CloudWatch metrics ](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/aws-services-cloudwatch-metrics.html) in the *Amazon CloudWatch User Guide*.   Conditional: If you published your metric with dimensions, you must specify the same dimensions in your scaling policy.

autoscaling.scalingpolicy.metric.Namespa.Description: The namespace of the metric. For more information, see the table in [AWS services that publish CloudWatch metrics ](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/monitoring/aws-services-cloudwatch-metrics.html) in the *Amazon CloudWatch User Guide*.
